mapper.sql: `id`, executor_name executorName, executor_address executorAddress, heartbeat_time heartbeatTime, `status`, create_time createTime
mapper.insert: insert into executor_info (executor_name, executor_address, status) values (#{executorName}, #{executorAddress}, 1) on duplicate key update status=1, heartbeat_time=now()
mapper.update: update executor_info set status=0 where heartbeat_time < date_sub(now(), interval 30 second)
